name: Phol Dhanya Public Company Limited
summary: Phol Dhanya Public Company Limited distributes occupational safety, health, and environment products in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Trading in Health and Safety Products, Water Treatment System, and Water Supply Systems for Villages. It offers personal protective equipment, including helmets, safety eye glasses, ear plugs, face shields, safety gloves, shoes, firefighting cloths, and other protective equipment; and safety and environment products, such as toxic gas and flammable gas detectors, emergency eye and body washers, chemical containment systems, moving and transfer equipment, ventilators, safety locks, and safety sign products. The company also provides control environment products comprising clean room clothing and clean room suit, as well as equipment for cleanroom, such as wipes, clean room stationary, cleaning equipment, antistatic devices, etc. In addition, it is involved in the engineering structural design, production, construction, and installation of water treatment systems; distribution of machinery and equipment related to water treatment systems, such as sediment filtration devices and chemical, water pumps, water storage tanks, and water treatment system kits for home and industrial applications; and selling of treated water in the form of concession contracts, as well as offers maintenance services for the system and equipment associated with water treatment systems. Phol Dhanya Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Pathum Thani, Thailand.
